about.text:
About - MARLO
Skip to main content
About us
MARLO delivers consulting and technology based solutions to clients in the transports and logistics sector:
Since 2006, Marlo has provided consulting and technology solutions to the transport and logistics sector.
The company is located in Norway and Portugal. Much experience has been gained through extensive participation in EU-funded research and development projects. In addition to using the results of such projects to establish commercial products and operations, Marlo has established an extensive network of partners throughout Europe and beyond.
Visible results of such projects are:
The maritime transport solution (RoRo) used by Stora Enso to move products from the Nordic countries through Gothenburg to Zeebrügge is based on concepts developed in an EU project led Marlo staff.
The company
MIXMOVE
was founded by Marlo in 2017, based on products developed in the EU project iCargo and used by organisations like 3M, DHL, DG Schenker, Gebrüder Weiss and others.
The new logistics single window used by all Portuguese ports was developed in the project
JUL
, where Marlo was one of the technology providers.

What makes MARLO unique?
Our Investment in Research and Development (R&D)
MARLO participates continuously in R&D projects in Europe (see our references section). The idea is to able to continuously feed state-of-the-art technology and know-how to our clients.
The Network of Specialists
A mix of seniority / experience with a selection of younger recognized talents. These specialists cover all areas related to transport management, cargo handling and associated technologies.
Our internal Software Factory
Constantly turning R&D results into real products and solutions
